query: ok so I got promoted to team lead last month and now I need to decide whether to keep coding 60% of the time or shift to mostly management. my skip-level said either is fine but I need to commit to one direction by our next 1:1 on thursday

we're moving next year and I keep going back and forth between staying in Portland where we have friends and community, or relocating to Austin where my wife got a really good offer. she says she's fine either way but I can tell she wants to go. help me think through this properly

should I use postgres or mongodb for this new service? it's a multi-tenant saas thing, mostly CRUD but we might need some analytics later. team is 3 people, we all know postgres but mongo might be simpler for the document-heavy parts

I can't decide between these two laptops. the M4 macbook pro is $2500 and the thinkpad X1 is $1800. I do a mix of coding and video editing. I've been on linux for 10 years but I'm kinda curious about macos

I have three different approaches for the auth system rewrite and I keep going in circles. Option A is roll our own with JWTs, B is Auth0 which costs $$$, C is Keycloak self-hosted. Each has serious tradeoffs and my CTO wants a recommendation by EOW. Can you help me structure my thinking here?

my landlord just told me they're selling the house and I need to figure out if I should try to buy it (they offered me first refusal at $380k) or find a new rental. I have about $50k saved. this is stressing me out, I have like 3 weeks to decide

weighing whether to go back to school for an MBA or just keep grinding at my current trajectory. I'm 32, making decent money as a senior PM, but I feel like I'm hitting a ceiling without the credential. Stanford accepted me but it's $200k all-in
pros and cons of switching our CI from Jenkins to GitHub Actions? we have about 40 pipelines and a dedicated devops person who knows Jenkins inside out

I need to pick a pediatrician for my kid and I'm overwhelmed. there are like 6 options in network and I've read reviews for all of them but I keep second-guessing myself. my wife thinks I'm overthinking it but this feels important

ugh I've been agonizing over whether to accept this contract gig for like a week now. it pays 2x my current salary but it's 6 months with no benefits and I'd have to quit my full-time job. my partner is nervous about it. I keep making spreadsheets and then ignoring them
can you help me write a pros and cons list component in React? I want two columns with drag and drop
what are the tradeoffs between REST and GraphQL? just explain the technical differences, I don't need help deciding — we already picked GraphQL, I just want to understand what we gave up
help me write a decision tree classifier in python using scikit-learn. I have a CSV with customer churn data and I want to predict which customers will leave
I need to refactor this function, it's getting too long. Can you break it into smaller pieces? Here's the code...
can you explain how the PrOACT framework works? I'm writing a blog post about decision-making methodologies
I already decided to use Kubernetes. Now help me set up the cluster — I need a deployment yaml for my Node.js app with 3 replicas
review this PR for me, it changes how we handle user preferences. I want to make sure the migration is safe before I merge
compare these two JSON objects and tell me what changed. here they are...
what's the best way to handle feature flags? I've heard of LaunchDarkly and split.io but also just using env vars. not really a decision I need help with, more just curious what's standard
I need to write a post-mortem for an outage we had last week. can you help me structure it? the root cause was a bad database migration that didn't have a rollback plan
